name: Monochrome Precision
summary: Sharp black-white technical minimalism with exact type, hairline grids, square discipline, and almost no decoration.

style_dna.philosophy: Radical subtraction: every visible element must carry information or structure.
style_dna.visual_signature: Black text, white field, hairline rules, square or low-radius panels, mono labels.
style_dna.surface_logic: Flat white and pale gray only; depth comes from alignment and rule weight.

palette.accent_policy: No accent color unless the source content requires semantic data color.
palette.semantic_policy: Use semantic color only in charts or pass/fail states.

layout.grid: Strict modular grid, strong left alignment, visible dividers.
layout.whitespace: Whitespace acts as structure, not decoration.
layout.image_treatment: Screenshots or diagrams in square frames, no soft lifestyle crops.

components.buttons: Outline or black-fill rectangles with direct labels.
components.cards: Flat panels, hairline borders, no decorative shadow.
components.tables: Compact rows, mono code/data columns, crisp dividers.

slides.accent_rule: Use black, white, and gray only unless data semantics require color.

document.heading_rule: Black headings, hairline section rules, compact code blocks.

source_inheritance.method: Synthesized from local getdesign.md working corpus.

do: Use line, spacing, and weight as the design system.
dont: Do not add accent colors for energy.

pptx: Use deterministic HTML/CSS or PPTX text boxes for final text.
Keep one core idea per slide and validate rendered PNG dimensions.
docx: Translate visual style into Word typography, margins, heading hierarchy, tables, and callouts.
Keep documents printable unless the user explicitly requests PDF-only visual art direction.
carousel: Use high-resolution fixed canvas, mobile-readable text, and safe margins.
Make each frame complete enough to stand alone.
